title: camax fraxinea
side_effects: Camax fraxinea can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Some people may experience headaches, dizziness, or nausea after consuming or applying the plant extracts. Prolonged or excessive use can also lead to more severe side effects, including kidney damage and respiratory problems. In rare cases, camax fraxinea can cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention.
